segments.title: Welcome to AI Broadcast
segments.dialogue_prompt: Welcome viewers to the AI-powered broadcast system. Introduce the hosts and explain what we'll be demonstrating today.

segments.title: AI Agent Demonstration
segments.dialogue_prompt: Discuss how AI agents collaborate in broadcast systems: producer, director, host, and co-host. Explain their roles and how they work together to create compelling content.

segments.title: Closing Thoughts
segments.dialogue_prompt: Thank viewers for watching, summarize what was demonstrated, and invite them to explore the AI broadcast system further.
